channel.title: TrustZone on CodetoCore
channel.description: Recent content in TrustZone on CodetoCore

item.title: TF-M vs TF-A — When Do You Reach For Which?
item.description: TF-M is for Cortex-M microcontrollers, TF-A is for Cortex-A application processors. Different exception models, different attack surfaces, not interchangeable.
